keys.description: Fallback provider when a tenant has no provider config for the resolved jurisdiction. NEVER used silently on failure — the fallback is a per-tenant default, not an outage-recovery path.
TaxJar production endpoint. Sandbox: https://api.sandbox.taxjar.com/v2.
TaxJar API version header.
Avalara production. Sandbox: https://sandbox-rest.avatax.com/api/v2.
Stripe API version pinned for tax calculations.
Master toggle for SyncTaxRatesFromProviderJob. Off = no scheduled sync (rates managed manually).
TaxJar rate sync cron. Weekly Monday 03:00 UTC.
Avalara rate sync cron. Weekly Tuesday 03:00 UTC (spread from TaxJar).
Stripe Tax rate sync cron. Weekly Wednesday 03:00 UTC.
Per-provider HTTP timeout. Shorter than marketing's 15s because tax calculations block invoice line creation.
Guzzle connect timeout.
Max retry attempts on transient failure. NOTE: unlike marketing's 6-attempt exponential, tax is aggressive — 3 attempts then dead-block (fail-safe against under-charging).
Exponential backoff for the 3 retry attempts. Fast — total window ~21s before dead-blocking.
Per-jurisdiction default provider selection when the tenant has multiple configured. Tenants override per-provider-config.enabled_jurisdictions.
Consecutive failures before the breaker opens.
1h open duration.
true = VerifyTaxExemptionJob auto-verifies when the issuing jurisdiction has a public registry cross-check. false = every exemption requires manual review.
Days before valid_until at which TaxExemptionExpiringNotification fires. Three-stage warning cadence.
S3 signed URL max lifetime for certificate_document_url. 15 min default. Longer than needed to protect against clock drift.
S3 signed URL lifetime for certificate view flow (admin reviewing an exemption). 4h default.
tax_calculations retention. 10 years for Enterprise with tax_extended_retention entitlement.
tax_exemptions retained this many years past valid_until (regulator audit window).
true = tax_rates never auto-purged. false = purge after 20 years (extreme old rates lose regulator relevance).
true = ReconcileProviderCalculationsJob runs weekly + spot-checks 1% of calculations.
Fraction of calculations spot-checked. 0.01 = 1%. Higher ratios burn API quota.
Absolute-difference threshold in cents. Any drift over this triggers TaxCalculationDriftDetected.
Percentage-difference threshold. Any drift over this triggers TaxCalculationDriftDetected.
